name: Barlow Park
description: Come play pickleball at Barlow Park in Ripon, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Fond Du Lac YMCA
description: Fond Du Lac YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fond du Lac, WI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Horace Mann High School
description: Six courts with permanent nets. Bring your own nets to play on the tennis court.
open_play_schedule: Can only play when school is not in session

name: Ripon Area School District Courts
description: Ripon Area School District Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ripon, WI. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Ripon College Thorne Street Courts
description: Ripon College Thorne Street Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ripon, WI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Taylor Park
description: Taylor Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fond du Lac, WI. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
